'''hangocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:svaraj|svaraj]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ng-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:svaraj|svaraj]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hangocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hængecheth|hængecheth]] || [[word:hængechej|hængechej]] || [[word:hængechesh|hængechesh]] || [[word:hængeche|hængeche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hangongochoth|hangongochoth]] || [[word:hangongochoj|hangongochoj]] || [[word:hangongochosh|hangongochosh]] || [[word:hangongocho|hangongocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hangochoth|hangochoth]] || [[word:hangochoj|hangochoj]] || [[word:hangochosh|hangochosh]] || [[word:hangocho|hangocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hangofchoth|hangofchoth]] || [[word:hangofchoj|hangofchoj]] || [[word:hangofchosh|hangofchosh]] || [[word:hangofchof|hangofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hangochotho|hangochotho]] || [[word:hangochojo|hangochojo]] || [[word:hangochosho|hangochosho]] || [[word:hangochoko|hangochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hangochoth|hangochoth]] || [[word:hangochoj|hangochoj]] || [[word:hangochosh|hangochosh]] || [[word:hangocho|hangocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hangochothol|hangochothol]] || [[word:hangochojol|hangochojol]] || [[word:hangochoshol|hangochoshol]] || [[word:hangochokol|hangochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hangochothotho|hangochothotho]] || [[word:hangochojojo|hangochojojo]] || [[word:hangochoshosho|hangochoshosho]] || [[word:hangochoko|hangochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hangochothon|hangochothon]] || [[word:hangochojon|hangochojon]] || [[word:hangochoshon|hangochoshon]] || [[word:hangochokon|hangochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hangochothoro|hangochothoro]] || [[word:hangochojoro|hangochojoro]] || [[word:hangochoshoro|hangochoshoro]] || [[word:hangochokoro|hangochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
